componentDescription: An input component for selecting colors, featuring a picker with predefined, recent, and custom color options.

id.description: An optional unique identifier for the input element.

error.description: An optional error object or message to display validation feedback.

helperText.description: An optional text displayed below the input to provide additional guidance or error messages.

name.description: The name of the input element, typically used for form submission.

label.description: The label text displayed for the color input.

placeholder.description: The placeholder text displayed in the input field when it's empty.

isReadOnly.description: A boolean indicating whether the input field is read-only.

isDisabled.description: A boolean indicating whether the input field is disabled.

isAutoFocus.description: A boolean indicating whether the input field should automatically gain focus on mount.

onChange.description: Callback function triggered when the input's value changes.

onBlur.description: Callback function triggered when the input loses focus.

onClick.description: Callback function triggered when the input is clicked.

onFocus.description: Callback function triggered when the input gains focus.

size.description: The size of the color input component, utilizing a custom `Size` type.

shadow.description: Defines the shadow style for the color input, accepting various shadow types.

shape.description: Defines the shape of the color input component.

views.description: Custom styles to override or extend the default appearance of the ColorInput.

value.description: The current value of the color input.

defaultValue.description: The initial default value of the color input.

variant.description: The visual variant style of the color input.

predefinedColors.description: An array of predefined colors for quick selection.

showCustomInput.description: A boolean to control the visibility of a custom color input field within the picker.

showRecentColors.description: A boolean to control the visibility of recently used colors in the picker.

colorFormat.description: The format in which the color value should be represented (e.g., hex, rgb).

maxRecentColors.description: The maximum number of recent colors to store and display.

closeOnSelect.description: A boolean indicating whether the color picker should close automatically after a color is selected.

onChangeComplete.description: Callback function triggered when the color selection process is completed (e.g., picker closes or final selection).

onOpen.description: Callback function triggered when the color picker dropdown opens.

onClose.description: Callback function triggered when the color picker dropdown closes.
